untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern formation cannot be explicitly coded with available indicators. Pattern recognition requires multi-bar formation analysis (swing highs/lows, geometric shape validation) which is not expressible using point-in-time price/technical indicators. Breakout direction detection and diamond height measurement also require historical pattern geometry analysis beyond the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using price trend (below SMA_20) and directional breakout logic (close crossing prev highs/lows), but this does not capture the actual diamond pattern geometry or height-based target calculation. A pattern recognition module or custom indicator would be required for proper implementation.
